description_long: This is a large, multi-story wooden house built into a sloped terrain, featuring a prominent gable roof and extensive balconies on both levels. The structure includes a main building and a smaller adjacent pavilion, both with matching roof styles. A rectangular swimming pool is situated between the two buildings, elevated above the ground and supported by columns. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and is accessed by a paved driveway that leads to the main entrance. The house is surrounded by landscaped grassy areas and is set atop a substantial earth embankment, giving it a commanding view over the surroundings. Large windows and open balcony railings provide ample natural light and outdoor living space.
description: A large, multi-story wooden house with a gable roof, balconies, and an elevated swimming pool, built into a sloped landscape with a fenced yard and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, balconies, swimming pool, adjacent pavilion, driveway, and fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep slope, pool elevation, and the relationship between the main house and pavilion.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the house, the slope, and the supporting structure beneath the pool.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the roof layout, pool placement, and the overall site plan with landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with steps, wooden columns, and a prominent overhang.
